coordination_skills: announce noisy actions before taking them
let scouts verify patrol lanes before group movement
coordinate regroup points after stealth breaks
metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the stealth coordination and detection management signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first stealth coordination and detection management choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on stealth coordination and detection management without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: A four-room mini-finale with one decoy, one ranged threat, one objective, and enough doors to require explicit communication.
scripts.warden_style: belief, clue, counterplay, and extraction composition

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Veiled Castle variant while preserving the stealth coordination and detection management signal.
